rejected_candidates.title: Profit check can be satisfied by preloaded ERC20/WETH balances even when no bounty is recovered
rejected_candidates.reason: The code does only snapshot ETH, so donated supported tokens can indeed satisfy the threshold, but this does not create a distinct protocol-level harm here: the donated assets are the caller's own funds, there is no privileged success signal or payout to misdirect, and any resulting balances are already permanently locked by F-001.
